channel.title: Toto Finance Blog
channel.description: Insights on tokenized commodities, real-world assets (RWA), precious metals, and the digital infrastructure for global trade.

item.title: React Hooks: A Deep Dive into Modern React Development
item.description: Master React hooks and learn how to build better React applications with functional components and modern patterns.
item.author: Mrinal

item.title: The Future of Web Development: Trends to Watch in 2024
item.description: Exploring the latest trends in web development and what developers should prepare for in 2024.
item.author: Mrinal

item.title: TypeScript Best Practices: Writing Type-Safe JavaScript Code
item.description: Learn TypeScript best practices to write more maintainable, type-safe JavaScript code and avoid common pitfalls in modern web development.
item.author: Mrinal

item.title: This is the second post of my new Astro blog.

item.title: Modern JavaScript: ES6+ Features Every Developer Should Know
item.description: Explore essential ES6+ JavaScript features that have transformed modern web development and learn best practices for writing cleaner, more maintainable code.
item.author: Mrinal

item.title: Mastering CSS Grid and Flexbox: A Complete Guide
item.description: Learn how to create responsive layouts using CSS Grid and Flexbox with practical examples and best practices.
item.author: Mrinal

item.title: Web Accessibility: Building Inclusive Digital Experiences
item.description: Learn about web accessibility principles, WCAG guidelines, and best practices for creating inclusive digital experiences that work for everyone.
item.author: Mrinal
